news.summary: An e-commerce powerhouse, Group Bayport, has unveiled their latest venture, PatioHQ, a novel online platform revolutionizing outdoor living. PatioHQ showcases a carefully chosen array of premium patio furniture, shade sails, and other items. The standout feature is the option for bespoke cushions crafted to perfectly suit your outdoor furniture. With choices in color, fabric, and size, customers can personalize their own cushions. Furthermore, all furniture is customizable to cater to individual requirements. This distinguished destination promises to enhance outdoor living experiences.
news.headline: Group Bayport introduces PatioHQ, an e-commerce site for custom outdoor living, featuring high-quality patio furniture, shade sails, and custom-made cushions tailored by color, fabric, and size.

news.summary: In Boston, Toast (NYSE: TOST), a comprehensive technology platform for restaurants, revealed a $5 million pledge over the next five years to combat worldwide food insecurity. The launch involves a collaboration with No Kid Hungry, a program by Share Our Strength against childhood hunger in the U.S. Toast intends to enhance these initiatives by urging its clients and their patrons to engage through the Toast Fundraising1 campaign.
news.headline: Toast pledges $5M over 5 years to fight food insecurity, starting with a partnership with No Kid Hungry. #EndChildhoodHunger.

news.summary: In New York City, Macy’s is set to kick off the Macy's 4th of July Fireworks® on Friday, July 4. The event will feature a spectacular display of light and sound from the iconic Brooklyn Bridge and four adjacent barges in the East River within the Seaport District. This year marks the 49th edition of the celebration, solidifying it as the largest Independence Day event in the country. Macy’s 4th of July Fireworks promises to deliver an unforgettable summer experience.
news.headline: Macy's 4th of July Fireworks returns to Brooklyn Bridge and East River as nation's largest Independence Day event.

news.summary: Firehook, a leading artisan cracker brand in the U.S., based in Los Angeles, has appointed Becca Millstein, CEO and Co-Founder of Fishwife, to its Board of Directors. This move aims to enhance Firehook's marketing and innovation strategies. Being the top brand of artisan crackers in the country, Firehook is eager to benefit from Millstein's fresh perspectives. This appointment is expected to play a significant role in shaping Firehook's future direction. Welcome Becca Millstein!
news.headline: Becca Millstein, Fishwife CEO and Co-Founder, joins Firehook's Board of Directors to enhance marketing and innovation strategies.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, YETI Holdings, Inc. disclosed that Arvind Bhatia is now the Vice President of Investor Relations. Bhatia, who will report to CFO Mike McMullen, will be tasked with spearheading the company's investor relations strategy and engaging with investors. Bhatia's expertise in the consumer industry and significant sell-side background will be valuable in enhancing YETI's connections with the investment community. YETI (NYSE: YETI) continues to expand its team to strengthen its investor relations initiatives.
news.headline: Arvind Bhatia joins YETI as Vice President of Investor Relations, overseeing outreach to investment community.

news.summary: Located in San Mateo, California, Glance, a consumer technology company with support from Google, has introduced Glance AI, an AI Commerce platform tailored for Samsung users in the United States. This platform offers innovative Generative-AI driven commerce and content discovery features. Through a strategic collaboration, Samsung users will now have the opportunity to utilize Glance's AI shopping and styling services. Glance AI is a cutting-edge Gen AI shopping platform revolutionizing the retail experience. Users can promptly preview themselves in various outfits and discover new trends seamlessly.
news.headline: Glance partners with Samsung Galaxy Store to revolutionize mobile commerce in the US with new AI shopping experience.

news.summary: In New York, Gannett Co., Inc. (NYSE: GCI) has partnered with Snowflake, an AI Data Cloud company, to become part of the Snowflake Marketplace. This collaboration allows businesses to enhance their AI applications with exclusive unstructured data from external sources, ensuring intellectual property protection and correct attribution. The partnership offers access to real-time news and content from USA TODAY and the USA TODAY Network comprising over 200 local outlets.
news.headline: Gannett Co., Inc. partners with Snowflake, joins Snowflake Marketplace for AI data, offering real-time news from USA TODAY. Characters: 106

news.summary: A company called AeroFarms based in Danville, VA, which specializes in indoor vertical farming and is a top supplier of microgreens to the U.S. retail market, is marking eight years of collaboration with Whole Foods Market (WFM). They have worked hand in hand to establish a new microgreens category within the leafy greens market. With a shared goal of providing access to nutritious food choices throughout the country, AeroFarms has made their microgreens available in every Whole Foods store nationwide. This partnership aims to promote healthier eating habits and make nutrient-rich options more widely accessible to the public.
news.headline: AeroFarms and Whole Foods Market mark 8-year partnership, leading supplier of microgreens to US retail market.

news.summary: The President is beginning to question his approach in winning over Beijing as tensions rise between the two trading partners.
news.headline: President expresses frustration over difficulty in reaching trade deal with China as tensions rise between the two countries.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Motorcar Parts of America, Inc. (Nasdaq: MPAA) revealed a forthcoming fireside chat presentation set for Wednesday, June 11, 2025, at 10:30 a.m. Eastern time. The event will take place during the 25th Annual Oppenheimer Consumer Growth & E-Commerce Conference in a virtual setting. Those interested can access a live audio webcast of the discussion via www.motorcarparts.com and it will be stored for 30 days after. Motorcar Parts of America, Inc. is the subject of this discussion.
news.headline: Motorcar Parts of America (Nasdaq:MPAA) to present at 25th Annual Oppenheimer Consumer Conference on June 11, 2025 at 10:30 a.m. Eastern time in a virtual format. Live audio webcast available.

Trump's tariffs have caused a reduction in supply and business activity among American manufacturers, with some companies comparing the situation to the 2020 crisis caused by the COVID-19 pandemic, according to a report from the US Institute for Supply Management.

news.summary: Anthony Scaramucci, founder of SkyBridge Capital and former White House communications director, has voiced concerns regarding the severity of Sam Bankman-Fried's prison sentence. Scaramucci deemed the 25-year term excessive, despite his own involvement with the collapse of FTX. "Is 25 years too harsh a punishment? I believe it is," Scaramucci stated in an interview with Crypto in America. Bankman-Fried, the creator of FTX cryptocurrency exchange, received this sentence in March 2024 for his involvement in a significant financial fraud. A federal jury found him guilty in November 2023. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Anthony Scaramucci questions 25-year sentence of FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried for financial fraud.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Zoomd Technologies Ltd. (TSXV: ZOMD) (OTC: ZMDTF) and its subsidiary Zoomd Ltd. disclosed their involvement in the marketing technology sector. They serve as a user-acquisition and engagement platform.
news.headline: Zoomd to attend LA Summit 2025 hosted by Centurion One Capital on June 4, 2025. Zoomd Technologies Ltd (TSXV: ZOMD) to join.

news.summary: Oracle has introduced new vendor-agnostic interoperability features in their Randomization and Trial Supply Management systems. These advancements allow for drug pooling and streamlined supply management automation across several trials. The development was announced in Austin, Texas, on June 4, 2025. This update signifies a significant step forward in enhancing efficiency and compatibility in clinical trial operations.
news.headline: Oracle introduces new interoperability advancements to automate drug supply management in clinical trials across vendors and studies.

news.summary: Enhance customer connections and boost income by utilizing advanced marketing solutions aimed at expanding your current client count. Taking place in New York on June 4, 2025, Cents introduces innovative business management tools tailored for garment care small and medium businesses (SMBs) to revolutionize operations and drive growth.
news.headline: Cents introduces advanced marketing automation for laundry businesses to boost customer base and revenue.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on June 4, 2025, Imandra Inc. unveiled the integration of AI Assistants such as ChatGPT, Claude, and Cursor with logical reasoning capabilities through Imandra Universe's Reasoning as a Service® MCP Servers. This enhancement allows AI Assistants to access direct logical reasoning. Imandra Inc. is recognized as a pioneer in cloud-scale automated reasoning. The implementation marks a significant development in the tech industry's evolution, offering advanced capabilities to AI Assistants. This integration has the potential to revolutionize the way AI systems operate by enabling them to leverage logical reasoning directly.
news.headline: Imandra Inc. launches Imandra Universe platform for AI agents with logical reasoning. Leading in automated reasoning.

news.summary: A grocery retailer operated by a family is providing members of Oklahoma {N}power® with a complimentary themed reusable bag from Natural Grocers and extra discounts. Headquartered in Lakewood, Colorado, the company is a prominent provider of organic and natural products in the United States. Customers are encouraged to take advantage of this offer for savings.
news.headline: Natural Grocers celebrates National Oklahoma Day from June 7-9, 2025 with gifts and savings for Oklahoma {N}power® members. Customers can get a free state-themed Natural Grocers reusable bag along with more savings.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Hub International Limited disclosed the acquisition of Scott Held Insurance Agency, Inc. by the leading global insurance brokerage and financial services firm. The deal involved obtaining the assets of Scott Held Insurance Agency. Specific details of the transaction were not disclosed.
news.headline: Hub International acquires Scott Held Insurance Agency in California to enhance commercial and personal insurance capabilities.

news.summary: In Easthampton, Massachusetts on June 4, 2025, a nonprofit organization known as The Treehouse Foundation unveiled its upcoming project - a three-year community research initiative set to begin in the spring. This initiative aims to enhance foster care and establish a sense of permanency for children through intergenerational community living. The project has secured funding from a undisclosed source.
news.headline: Treehouse Foundation invests in research, appoints new CEO to enhance foster care with a three-year, community research initiative.

news.summary: Peet's Coffee, based in EMERYVILLE, Calif., announced on June 4, 2025, a range of new offerings for the summer season. Among these are vibrant peach-infused beverages, enticing new food options, and classic zero-proof cocktails. These additions cater to a variety of tastes and occasions, providing the perfect lineup for the summer months. This update reflects Peet's commitment to delivering innovative and refreshing choices for its customers.
news.headline: Peet's Coffee unveils new summer menu with sparkling drinks, mocktails, and savory bites. Bright and refreshing lineup.

news.summary: Electrosoft Services, Inc., a cybersecurity and IT solutions firm based in Reston, Virginia, revealed on June 4, 2025, the appointment of Kimberly Esparza as their new Vice President of Human Resources. This strategic move emphasizes the company's dedication to promoting HR as a crucial element in business leadership and expansion. As Electrosoft continues to experience rapid growth, Esparza will play a significant role in steering the human resources department. This decision marks a pivotal moment for the company as they focus on leveraging HR practices to drive overall business success.
news.headline: Electrosoft Services hires Kimberly Esparza as VP of Human Resources to elevate HR as a critical business function.

news.summary: In Miami, a data-driven commodity brokerage firm called Snapper Creek Energy unveiled its newest Power brokerage desk aimed at catering to the Electric Reliability Council of Texas (ERCOT) and Pennsylvania-New Jersey-Maryland Interconnection (PJM) power markets. The firm specializes in traditional, renewable, and transitional energy markets. Marking this announcement, Dennis Bosworth and John Olsen have joined Snapper Creek as Co-heads. The move is geared towards expanding the firm's reach in these key markets.
news.headline: Snapper Creek Energy launches Power Brokerage Desk for ERCOT & PJM markets, hires Dennis Bosworth & John Olsen.

news.summary: In New York, Sharon AI, Inc. and New Era Helium Inc. announced an operational update for their joint venture, Texas Critical Data Centers LLC (TCDC), concerning a planned 250MW AI/HPC Data Center in Ector County, Texas. Sharon AI, a High-Performance Computing company specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Cloud GPU Compute Infrastructure, partnered with New Era Helium, an exploration and production platform in the Permian Basin, for this project. The non-binding Memorandum of Understanding outlines the collaboration.
news.headline: Sharon AI and New Era Helium sign MOU with PowerFoward Energy for 250MW AI/HPC Data Center in Texas.

news.summary: In Westlake Village, California, and Austin, Texas, Energy Vault Holdings Inc. (NYSE: NRGV) and Jupiter Power have signed an agreement for the supply of a new battery energy storage system (BESS) at a Jupiter site in the Electric Reliability Council of. Energy Vault is known for its sustainable, grid-scale energy storage solutions, while Jupiter is a prominent developer and operator of utility-scale battery energy storage projects in the US. This collaboration underscores the commitment to advancing energy storage capabilities, further solidifying both companies' positions in the industry.
news.headline: Energy Vault and Jupiter Power sign deal for 100MW/200MWh battery storage system at ERCOT site.

news.summary: Silfab Solar, the top PV module manufacturer in North America, has achieved Top Performer status for its Silfab Commercial series of PV modules, including SIL 530XM and SIL 580XM+. This recognition comes from the rigorous Kiwa PV Evolution Labs (PVEL) product qualification program. By meeting the testing standards, Silfab Solar demonstrates its commitment to deploying innovative technologies while maintaining high-quality control measures. This achievement showcases the company's dedication to excellence in the solar industry.
news.headline: Silfab Solar named "Top Performer" in 2025 PV Module Reliability Scorecard by Kiwa PVEL for SIL 530XM and SIL 580XM+.

news.summary: In Wirral, England, LDRA, a prominent provider of automated software verification and standards compliance solutions, has recently become a member of both the Renesas Ready Partner Network and the R-Car Consortium. This strategic partnership aims to enhance LDRA's offerings by extending its backing for system development utilizing Renesas R-Car system on a chip (SoCs), microprocessors (MPUs), and microcontrollers (MCUs). Particularly focusing on adhering to functional safety and cybersecurity standards essential across the industry. This news highlights LDRA's growing involvement in the aerospace domain, underlining its commitment to ensuring compliance with stringent quality criteria.
news.headline: LDRA partners with Renesas, joins R-Car Consortium to enhance software development for safety-critical systems. #Collaboration #LDRA #Renesas #R-CarConsortium

news.summary: In an announcement made today in Washington, the Global Network for Zero (GNFZ) revealed its initial net zero certified venture in Brazil. Collaborating with OTEC, a prominent sustainability consulting company in Brazil, LFRV Sociedade de Advogados (LFRV Associados), a Brazilian law firm, has been granted GNFZ’s coveted Net Zero Operations: Emissions certification for its office premises. This accreditation showcases the ongoing uptake of net zero certifications and environmentally friendly construction methods throughout Latin America. Hailing from Brazil, this certification is a significant step in the region's sustainability efforts.
news.headline: First Brazilian project certified by Global Network for Zero for net zero emissions. Collaboration with OTEC, LFRV Sociedade de Advogados.
RUSSIAN FOREIGN MINISTRY ON REFUSAL OF GERMANY TO EXTEND RESIDENCE PERMIT FOR RUSSIAN STATE JOURNALIST: WE WILL TAKE RETALIATORY MEASURES AGAINST GERMAN JOURNALISTS IN RUSSIA

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) revealed a partnership with Fragmetric, a Solana-based liquid restaking protocol. This collaboration will see Fragmetric incorporating the dfdvSOL Liquid Staking Token (LST) into its platform, marking dfdvSOL as one of just five LSTs supported by the protocol. DeFi Dev Corp. is recognized as the initial US public company with a treasury approach centered on accumulating and compounding Solana (SOL).
news.headline: DeFi Dev Corp. partners with Fragmetric to integrate dfdvSOL LST into restaking platform, only one of five LSTs supported.

news.summary: Shenzhen, China - Fangdd Network Group Ltd. (Nasdaq: DUO), a property technology company in China, has announced a share consolidation plan. Starting at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time on June 9, 2025, every 16 ordinary shares with a par value of US$0.0005625 per share will be consolidated into 1 ordinary share with a par value of US$0.009 per share. Post-consolidation, the Company's Class A ordinary shares will begin trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol "DUO" with the new CUSIP number G33147128.
news.headline: FangDD (Nasdaq: DUO) announces share consolidation, every 16 shares now equal 1 share with par value US$0.009. Effective June 9, 2025.

news.summary: Upcoming projects in Florida, Rhode Island, and California are set to generate around 3 megawatts of power once fully operational.
news.headline: Enphase Energy's IQ8 microinverters with domestic content chosen for projects in FL, RI, and CA, totaling 3MW capacity.

news.summary: This information is not intended for distribution to U.S. newswire services or for dissemination within the United States. Failure to adhere to this restriction could potentially result in a violation of U.S. securities regulations.
news.headline: Marimaca Copper plans $17.7 million private placement, not for US distribution, non-compliance violates law.

news.summary: Akebia is continuously releasing significant, clinically pertinent information to enhance physicians’ comprehension of Vafseo® (vadadustat). This data is vital for informing healthcare professionals about the efficacy and safety of Vafseo® in treating various medical conditions. It serves as a valuable resource for physicians seeking to improve patient outcomes through informed treatment decisions. The continuous publication of such crucial information by Akebia underscores its commitment to advancing medical knowledge and ensuring the optimal use of Vafseo® in clinical practice.
news.headline: Akebia published U.S. patient data on Vadadustat in AS of Nephrology to aid physician understanding.

news.summary: Highlighting Hydrafacial's prominent position and benefits for both providers and consumers, the latest data reveals its excellent standing in the market. With a notable increase in customers, reaching over 500,000 treatments performed annually, Hydrafacial continues to lead the industry. Providers also witness the advantages, experiencing a more than 30% growth in their business after adopting Hydrafacial. The positive feedback from consumers further solidifies Hydrafacial's reputation, with a satisfaction rate of over 90%. Its success is evident in its presence in more than 87 countries, showcasing a global impact.
news.headline: BeautyHealth's 35,000 Hydrafacial devices worldwide meet growing demand for effective skincare; proves value to providers and consumers.
Elicio Therapeutics secures $10M in financing for their projects.

news.summary: Reno, Nevada, June 4th, 2025 - A tech holding company, GlobalTech Corporation (GTC, OTC:GTLK), known for AI and big data solutions, has partnered with Omantel, Oman’s top telecom provider. The agreement, outlined in a Memorandum of Understanding, aims to investigate joint ventures in AI and Big Data services. This collaboration signifies a significant step in the tech sector, combining GlobalTech's expertise with Omantel's strong presence in Oman's telecommunications industry.
news.headline: Omantel & GlobalTech sign MOU for AI & Big Data services, potential revenue share.

news.summary: In a recent update on June 4, 2025, Mizuho Americas disclosed their appointment of Nick Setyan as the Managing Director and Senior Equity Research Analyst in charge of the Restaurant sector. Setyan will operate from Los Angeles and will be under the supervision of Bill Featherston, the Head of Americas Equity Research.
news.headline: Mizuho Americas hired Nick Setyan as Managing Director and Senior Equity Research Analyst for the Restaurant sector in Los Angeles. Reported on June 4, 2025.

news.summary: In May 2025, BitFuFu released unaudited updates on its production and mining operations, revealing the production of 400 Bitcoin and achieving a record hashrate of 34.1 EH/s.
news.headline: BitFuFu reports 400 Bitcoin produced and record hashrate of 34.1 EH/s in May 2025 update.

news.summary: Rocket Doctor has recently been chosen to help expedite the delivery of accessible, technology-driven healthcare services to disadvantaged areas. This decision is projected to greatly strengthen Rocket Doctor's efforts in bringing quality care to underserved communities.
news.headline: Rocket Doctor partners with Larta Institute's Heal.LA Accelerator to expand virtual care access to underserved communities.

news.summary: A renowned hair and skin care brand is focusing on expanding its presence both locally and globally. The brand, which offers premium solutions for hair and skin, is looking to reach a wider audience within the country as well as target international markets. With their high-quality products gaining popularity, the brand aims to cater to the demands of consumers worldwide by making their offerings available in numerous countries. This strategic approach is expected to significantly increase their market reach and boost sales figures, attracting a larger customer base.
news.headline: Reviv3 Procare® teams with JuiceCo Pro Agency, led by Jack Ingraham, to expand globally in hair and skin solutions.
Allarity Therapeutics partners with Indiana Biosciences Research Institute to study Stenoparib's dual mechanism of action.

news.summary: Kaltura's AI learning agent "Class Genie" was recently honored by a leading global awards program, standing out among thousands of cutting-edge educational technologies. The recognition was awarded for Class Genie's exceptional capability in generating hyper-personalized learning experiences and enhancing the discoverability of content. This accolade highlights Class Genie's effectiveness and innovation in the field of education technology.
news.headline: Kaltura's AI learning agent "Class Genie" wins "e-Learning Innovation of the Year" award for personalized education.

news.summary: Integral Metals has partnered with UMR to further develop the KAP Project, aiming to establish the foundation for a potential resource estimate. The collaboration between the two companies is set to enhance the project's progress and potential. This strategic partnership signifies an important step forward in the project's advancement, with significant potential outcomes for resource assessment.
news.headline: Integral Metals hires geological consultant for KAP Project study; partners with UMR for resource planning.

news.summary: AB "ŽEMAITIJOS PIENAS" has been notified of a transaction by a senior manager involving the company's securities. This transaction concerns a significant number of shares, as outlined in the accompanying documentation.
news.headline: AB "ŽEMAITIJOS PIENAS" notified of transaction involving issuer's securities by a manager.

news.summary: A Phase 1 clinical trial has been initiated to evaluate the safety, tolerability, optimal dosage for Phase 2, and preliminary effectiveness of the investigational drug 177Lu-RAD20 in patients with advanced HER2-positive solid tumors. This study aims to identify the right dose of the drug and observe any early signs of efficacy. The trial involves testing this treatment in a small group of individuals to assess its potential benefits in treating this specific type of cancer.
news.headline: First patient dosed in Phase 1 'HEAT' trial of 177Lu-RAD202 for HER2-positive solid tumors. Study aims to assess safety and efficacy.

news.summary: Repertoire has bolstered its leadership team in preparation for the initiation of the first-in-human clinical trial of their TCR bispecific development candidate, RPTR-1-201. This was solidified with the appointment of a globally renowned oncology expert and industry veteran. The company, based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, is set to advance its groundbreaking research with the inclusion of this new team member. The announcement was made on June 4, 2025.
news.headline: Repertoire Immune Medicines appoints Robert Andtbacka, MD, as CMO, advances TCR Bispecific Candidate RPTR-1-201 towards clinic.

news.summary: A recent partnership on a global scale will result in the integration of a sustaintech platform's carbon evaluation technology into IAS's platform. This collaboration will allow marketers to gauge their media's environmental impact in addition to assessing quality and attention metrics. The partnership was announced in New York on June 4, 2025.
news.headline: IAS partners with Impact Plus to measure media's environmental impact alongside quality metrics globally. (words: 14)

news.summary: The recent award signifies the most significant production deal secured by Raytheon, a subsidiary of RTX (NYSE: RTX), to date. On June 4, 2025, the company based in TUCSON, Ariz., received a substantial $1.1 billion contract from the U.S. Navy. This contract is designated for the manufacturing of AIM-9X Block II missiles, marking it as the most substantial agreement granted for this particular program. This development highlights a significant step forward for Raytheon and solidifies its position in the defense industry.
news.headline: RTX's Raytheon wins $1.1B U.S. Navy contract for AIM-9X Block II missiles, largest contract ever for program.

news.summary: In Aurora, Illinois on June 4, 2025, Scientel Solutions organized its 8th Annual Putting for Veterans Golf Outing at White Eagle Golf Club in Naperville. The event successfully garnered a noteworthy sum of $120,000 for the second consecutive year. This initiative serves as an annual fundraiser to support veterans in need, showing continuous growth and impact in the community.
news.headline: Scientel Solutions' golf outing raises $120,000 for local veterans. Annual event at White Eagle Golf Club.

news.summary: In Omaha, Nebraska, on June 4, 2025, CLAAS is promoting the use of technology by dairy producers to enhance forage quality during June Dairy Month. They aim to assist producers in achieving greater operational efficiencies in the field, leading to increased milk production and better cow health.
news.headline: Technology in forage harvesting boosts milk production; CLAAS aids dairy producers for efficiencies in the field.
